name: Simple Hud
tagline: A simple heads-up display for your glasses
description: A simple HUD for those that want a minimalistic always on display. Shows the time, weather, and microphone decibel level.
author: Ryan Diaz

permissions.name: network
permissions.desc: This app needs to access the network in order to access weather data.

permissions.name: location
permissions.desc: Fetches weather data for your location

permissions.name: g2-microphone
permissions.desc: This app can display the current decibel level from your microphone
